US_retail_prices.description: Retail prices (in dollars) of the Japanese automobile model from an independent random sample of 50 sales in the United States. Compared with Japan_retail_prices for the same model.

Japan_retail_prices.description: Retail prices (converted from yen to dollars) of the Japanese automobile model from an independent random sample of 50 sales in Japan. Compared with US_retail_prices for the same model.
